items.title_zh: 私人飞机坠毁后，旁观者砸碎窗户营救乘客
items.desc_en: One of the six people on board died in the crash, a local official said. The five survivors were taken to hospital and are in a stable condition.
items.desc_zh: 当地官员称，机上六人中有一人在事故中死亡。五名幸存者被送往医院，目前情况稳定。

items.title_en: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者
items.desc_en: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.
items.desc_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃成功接受肺移植手术
items.desc_en: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.
items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.title_en: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普批评，以色列对黎巴嫩发动新的打击
items.desc_en: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.desc_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。

items.desc_zh: 随处建造。重组治理。

items.title_en: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.title_zh: 以色列民族主义者无视规则，耶路撒冷圣地的现状受到威胁
items.desc_en: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.
items.desc_zh: 以色列民族主义者越来越多地蔑视关于信仰如何共享阿克萨清真寺大院的公约。

items.title_en: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.title_zh: FBI 称，该组织计划使用狙击手和无人机袭击白宫 UFC 赛事
items.desc_en: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.desc_zh: 在新公布的法庭文件中，政府表示，该组织据称对腐败、爱泼斯坦档案和数据中心表示不满。

items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
items.desc_en: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的二把手格温·肖特韦尔 (Gwynne Shotwell) 如何帮助 SpaceX 成为 IPO 巨头

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.title_en: Under-16s will be banned from social media from early 2027
items.title_zh: 从 2027 年初起，16 岁以下青少年将被禁止使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令——大胆而直率，但没有灵丹妙药

items.desc_zh: BBC 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 讲述年轻人上网即将发生的重大变化。

items.title_en: What is the UK social media ban for under-16s?
items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。
